request.objectPrompt:
A batch sheet of separate static forage resource item pickups for a cozy top-down onchain farming/adventure game.
Each cell is one independent inventory/resource pickup, not an animation frame.
Every item should be readable as a small 32px world drop while still painted at high resolution.
Use the row and column map exactly.
Row 0 column 0: Marker pebble (marker_pebble) - small mint marker pebble with a pale route notch.
Row 0 column 1: Oracle glass crystal (oracle_glass_crystal) - tiny cyan oracle crystal shard with violet base.
Row 0 column 2: Copper ore (copper_ore) - small copper ore nugget with warm orange metal glints.
Row 0 column 3: Opal gem (opal_gem) - small opal gem with pearl, pink, teal, and violet fire.
Row 1 column 0: Mint reed fiber (mint_reed_fiber) - fresh mint reed fiber bundle with wet teal tips.
Row 1 column 1: Pearl moss (pearl_moss) - soft pearl moss tuft dotted with lavender dew beads.
Row 1 column 2: Violet mycela (violet_mycela) - curling violet mushroom-thread cluster with pale cyan tips.
Row 1 column 3: Glass reed shard (glass_reed_shard) - thin translucent reed shard like cyan glass grass.
Row 2 column 0: Liquidity algae (liquidity_algae) - small teal algae swirl with pink and violet currents.
Row 2 column 1: Rose quartz chip (rose_quartz_chip) - tiny rose quartz mineral chip with faceted pink edge.
Row 2 column 2: Civic clay (civic_clay) - small smooth lavender clay lump with mint speckle.
Row 2 column 3: Route thread spool (route_thread_spool) - mini pearly thread spool wrapped with route-silk.
Row 3 column 0: Swamp glass nodule (swamp_glass_nodule) - rounded dark teal glass nodule with cyan glow.
Row 3 column 1: Oracle amber (oracle_amber) - small honey-cyan amber bead with suspended violet fleck.
Row 3 column 2: Pool pearl (pool_pearl) - round pool pearl with teal reflection and pink highlight.
Row 3 column 3: Moonlit bark (moonlit_bark) - small moonlit bark flake in lavender-gray and pale mint.
request.stylePrompt: cozy hand-painted 2D game item pickups, three-quarter top-down view, transparent background, crisp readable silhouettes at 32 pixel gameplay size, small isolated resource icons centered in each cell, Uniswap-inspired violet, mint, pearl, pink, cyan, teal, and lavender-gray palette, soft natural edges, warm but balanced highlights, no readable text, no logos, no UI

image.title: Forage Resources B sprite sheet
image.prompt:
Create a game object sprite sheet for Forage Resources B.
Object brief: A batch sheet of separate static forage resource item pickups for a cozy top-down onchain farming/adventure game.
Each cell is one independent inventory/resource pickup, not an animation frame.
Every item should be readable as a small 32px world drop while still painted at high resolution.
Use the row and column map exactly.
Row 0 column 0: Marker pebble (marker_pebble) - small mint marker pebble with a pale route notch.
Row 0 column 1: Oracle glass crystal (oracle_glass_crystal) - tiny cyan oracle crystal shard with violet base.
Row 0 column 2: Copper ore (copper_ore) - small copper ore nugget with warm orange metal glints.
Row 0 column 3: Opal gem (opal_gem) - small opal gem with pearl, pink, teal, and violet fire.
Row 1 column 0: Mint reed fiber (mint_reed_fiber) - fresh mint reed fiber bundle with wet teal tips.
Row 1 column 1: Pearl moss (pearl_moss) - soft pearl moss tuft dotted with lavender dew beads.
Row 1 column 2: Violet mycela (violet_mycela) - curling violet mushroom-thread cluster with pale cyan tips.
Row 1 column 3: Glass reed shard (glass_reed_shard) - thin translucent reed shard like cyan glass grass.
Row 2 column 0: Liquidity algae (liquidity_algae) - small teal algae swirl with pink and violet currents.
Row 2 column 1: Rose quartz chip (rose_quartz_chip) - tiny rose quartz mineral chip with faceted pink edge.
Row 2 column 2: Civic clay (civic_clay) - small smooth lavender clay lump with mint speckle.
Row 2 column 3: Route thread spool (route_thread_spool) - mini pearly thread spool wrapped with route-silk.
Row 3 column 0: Swamp glass nodule (swamp_glass_nodule) - rounded dark teal glass nodule with cyan glow.
Row 3 column 1: Oracle amber (oracle_amber) - small honey-cyan amber bead with suspended violet fleck.
Row 3 column 2: Pool pearl (pool_pearl) - round pool pearl with teal reflection and pink highlight.
Row 3 column 3: Moonlit bark (moonlit_bark) - small moonlit bark flake in lavender-gray and pale mint..

Reference image 1 is a checkerboard layout guide. Use it as the exact composition template with exact sizes, all cells are square all equal size.
Preserve its 4:4 sheet ratio and its 4 columns by 4 rows of equal square cells.
The exact guide has also been saved locally at generated/object-sprites/forage-resources-b/object-sprite-layout-guide.png for verification.
Place exactly one frame in the center of each checkerboard cell.
Align the center of each object frame to the center of its cell.
Keep every frame fully inside its own cell, with consistent margins and no overlap into neighboring cells.
Keep the checkerboard grid visible in the final image so the generated frames can be verified against the grid.
Preserve the alternating white and gray cell backgrounds from the guide.
Draw the object frames on top of the provided checkerboard cells.

Target runtime atlas metadata: 512x512 logical units, arranged as 4 rows by 4 columns.
Each logical grid cell is 128x128 units. The generated image may be higher resolution, but it must keep the same 4:4 grid ratio.
Keep the object scale, anchor point, perspective, and lighting consistent across cells.
Do not crop any object. Leave enough breathing room inside each cell for animation motion.
Do not draw labels, text, numbers, watermarks, decorative borders, or UI.
Use a transparent background for every cell.

Rows, top to bottom:
Row 0: Forage Item Row 0 (row-0) - column 0: Marker pebble (marker_pebble) - small mint marker pebble with a pale route notch; column 1: Oracle glass crystal (oracle_glass_crystal) - tiny cyan oracle crystal shard with violet base; column 2: Copper ore (copper_ore) - small copper ore nugget with warm orange metal glints; column 3: Opal gem (opal_gem) - small opal gem with pearl, pink, teal, and violet fire
Row 1: Forage Item Row 1 (row-1) - column 0: Mint reed fiber (mint_reed_fiber) - fresh mint reed fiber bundle with wet teal tips; column 1: Pearl moss (pearl_moss) - soft pearl moss tuft dotted with lavender dew beads; column 2: Violet mycela (violet_mycela) - curling violet mushroom-thread cluster with pale cyan tips; column 3: Glass reed shard (glass_reed_shard) - thin translucent reed shard like cyan glass grass
Row 2: Forage Item Row 2 (row-2) - column 0: Liquidity algae (liquidity_algae) - small teal algae swirl with pink and violet currents; column 1: Rose quartz chip (rose_quartz_chip) - tiny rose quartz mineral chip with faceted pink edge; column 2: Civic clay (civic_clay) - small smooth lavender clay lump with mint speckle; column 3: Route thread spool (route_thread_spool) - mini pearly thread spool wrapped with route-silk
Row 3: Forage Item Row 3 (row-3) - column 0: Swamp glass nodule (swamp_glass_nodule) - rounded dark teal glass nodule with cyan glow; column 1: Oracle amber (oracle_amber) - small honey-cyan amber bead with suspended violet fleck; column 2: Pool pearl (pool_pearl) - round pool pearl with teal reflection and pink highlight; column 3: Moonlit bark (moonlit_bark) - small moonlit bark flake in lavender-gray and pale mint

Columns, left to right:
Column 0: slot 1.
Column 1: slot 2.
Column 2: slot 3.
Column 3: slot 4.

Column behavior:
This is a batch sheet of separate static world props, not animation frames.
Each cell must contain the specific prop named by its row and column.
Do not evolve, transform, or animate objects across columns.
Keep perspective, lighting, palette, shadow softness, and scale language consistent across all cells.
Small props may leave more transparent space inside their cell; large landmarks should still fit fully inside their cell.
Every prop must be isolated on a transparent background and usable as an independent in-world object.

Style direction:
cozy hand-painted 2D game item pickups, three-quarter top-down view, transparent background, crisp readable silhouettes at 32 pixel gameplay size, small isolated resource icons centered in each cell, Uniswap-inspired violet, mint, pearl, pink, cyan, teal, and lavender-gray palette, soft natural edges, warm but balanced highlights, no readable text, no logos, no UI
Reference image 2 is a style reference. Use it for palette, rendering texture, edge softness, contrast, and game-art finish. Do not copy its subject unless it matches the object brief.

Return one PNG containing the full sprite sheet only.
